title: selaginella gynostachya
intro: Selaginella gynostachya, also known as spikemoss or resurrection fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to tropical regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella gynostachya include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and reduce symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
